content: For browser large-graph rendering: cosmos.gl is the standout for 1M+ nodes/links with all layout+draw on GPU shaders; Sigma.js (WebGL) handles ~100k edges but force layout falls over beyond ~50k edges; canvas tops out ~5k/5k; KeyLines/ReGraph (commercial) most performant overall. cosmos.gl is the recommended OSS choice for the 500k-5M node / tens-of-millions-edge live-layout target.
